creator: hrkfrd@googlemail.com
text:
Hey,

it turned out to be a problem with the if_re driver which I have "bypassed"
by turning off these options with ifconfig: rxcsum txcsum tso lro vlanhwtag

Additionally I have applied Pyun YongHyeon's patches for if_re.
So far things are stable if I run apache2.2 with the prefork MPM.

Henrik.
